text.title: accessibility-first-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for accessibility-first-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using only div and span with CSS classes for all layout and interactive elements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Screen readers receive no semantic information; keyboard navigation and assistive technology integrations break entirely.

failure-mode.description: Agents over-add ARIA roles (e.g., "role=button" on actual button elements).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce "no ARIA when native exists" rule in prompts.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated alt text invents content for unfamiliar imagery.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Supply caption/context or require human approval for non-decorative images.

failure-mode.description: Heading-hierarchy guesses miss visual context (an H1-styled subtitle is not an H1).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require designer-confirmed heading structure as input.

failure-mode.description: Agent skip-link suggestions can collide with framework routers (anchor + SPA route).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Color suggestions to "fix contrast" can break brand palette.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents should propose tonal scale extensions, not arbitrary hex changes.

failure-mode.description: Auto-applied prefers-reduced-motion can hide essential CSS-driven loaders.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide static fallback, not just "remove animation".

failure-mode.description: Agents tend to satisfy axe but miss focus visibility on dark themes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require visual regression with Chromatic or Percy + a11y addon.

failure-mode.description: "Use ARIA labels everywhere" is not the same as accessibility.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Redundant labels confuse screen readers (announces twice). Agent must check pairing.
